prompt: Assess lifecycle state, percent complete, defects, and remaining work.
scenario: In a T2 work setting, the evaluated element is E-304 Wire pulling (feeders & branch) within 2.1 Electrical. The relevant subcategory is 2.1.3 Wire & Cable. The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors NEC 200.6, 210.5 (identification). Treat this as roughly 70 percent complete until defects are corrected.
title: T2 E-304 Progress assessment
